'''''White Wolf Magazine'' 15''' was a roleplaying magazine from April/May of [[1989]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including a rules supplement for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Let the Dice Decide]]" and was written by [[Sean Stevenson]].
